archetype.name: Social Short
archetype.editorial_goal: Compress a vertical founder or voiceover clip into a fast proof-led short with a hook, claim, visual proof, and CTA.

reference.media_policy: Reference only. Do not commit downloaded video, audio, frames, subtitles, or screenshots.
reference.notes: Timing and cue text are lightweight observations for planning fixtures, not a complete transcript.

target.pacing: hard cuts with new visual proof every 2-4 seconds

observed_scene_timing.primary_visual: talking head with oversized emphasis captions
observed_scene_timing.purpose: create immediate tension and make the viewer understand the stakes

observed_scene_timing.primary_visual: talking head interrupted by quick proof inserts
observed_scene_timing.purpose: state the pain or confession without dead air

observed_scene_timing.primary_visual: product or workflow insert tied to the spoken claim
fast demo, screen, object, or result montage
observed_scene_timing.purpose: turn the spoken claim into visible evidence
convert attention into the next action

structure_sections.label: Provocative Hook
structure_sections.intent: Open on a direct tension statement.
structure_sections.visual_strategy: Keep face or voice spine dominant; add 1-4 word burned-in emphasis.

structure_sections.label: Problem Or Confession
structure_sections.intent: Make the problem concrete and relatable.
structure_sections.visual_strategy: Remove filler and add quick inserts for specific nouns or claims.

structure_sections.label: Fix Or Upgrade Claim
structure_sections.intent: State the mechanism that changes the outcome.
structure_sections.visual_strategy: Show product UI, system state, or workflow evidence when the claim is spoken.

structure_sections.label: Proof Or Demo
structure_sections.intent: Prove the mechanism with an observable result.
structure_sections.visual_strategy: Use screen capture, object footage, result stills, or contact-sheet proof.

structure_sections.label: CTA Or Proof Montage
structure_sections.intent: Show where to go next and leave a final proof impression.
structure_sections.visual_strategy: Use site/product montage with clear readable scale and a clean final frame.

transcript_cue_snippets.snippet: Stop shipping demo videos without proof.
transcript_cue_snippets.proof_requirement: No proof insert required yet; prioritize retention caption.

transcript_cue_snippets.snippet: Most edits explain the feature, but the viewer never sees the result.
transcript_cue_snippets.proof_requirement: Show a before/after or missing-proof visual.

transcript_cue_snippets.snippet: A new agent should match each claim to the exact visual evidence.
transcript_cue_snippets.proof_requirement: Insert product planning UI or proof map.

transcript_cue_snippets.snippet: When I say website, it cuts to the site and checks the frame.
transcript_cue_snippets.proof_requirement: Show vertical website capture and verification frame.

transcript_cue_snippets.snippet: Use the recipe, review the proof map, then render the short.
transcript_cue_snippets.proof_requirement: Show CTA montage: recipe, proof map, final render.

inputs.description: User-owned vertical talking-head or voiceover clip with word-aligned transcript.
User-owned product UI or website capture for concrete claims.
Result shots, object footage, contact sheets, or screenshots that prove spoken claims.

planner_outputs: caption frame plan with 1-4 emphasized words per caption
proof map linking claims to source receipts and assets
expected_core_flow: validate transcript, source receipts, asset candidates, and beat candidates
render with caller-provided media that resolves placeholder URIs

quality_gates: No committed binary media or downloaded reference assets.
Every concrete claim has a proof route or explicit caption-only fallback.
Caption snippets remain readable in 9:16 safe areas.
Approved beat token ranges are sorted and non-overlapping after manifest compilation.
